item.title: A Victorian Message in the Thames Mud
item.description: Nicola White uncovers a Victorian message hidden in the Thames foreshore and explores its history through mudlarking. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to

media:content.media:title: A Victorian Message in the Thames Mud

item.title: A Mudlarking Find Reveals a Forgotten Story
item.description: A muddy Thames find leads Nicola White to a forgotten story from the river foreshore. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A Mudlarking Find Reveals a Forgotten Story
media:content.media:description: A muddy Thames find leads Nicola White to a forgotten story from the river foreshore. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A Rolex Find on the Thames Foreshore
item.description: Nicola White explores a Thames foreshore find and considers whether it could be a real Rolex. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores a Thames foreshore find and considers whether it could be a real Rolex. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Pot Found While Mudlarking
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares the story behind a pot found while mudlarking. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A Pot Found While Mudlarking
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares the story behind a pot found while mudlarking. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.
